conflict: the road is reopening; the custodians insist on completing the naming; each family must decide what version of itself to present
consequence: the possibility of departure creates urgency; the debate reveals that every family has been changed by the experience; the original declarations are acknowledged as insufficient even by those who resist; each family faces its own reckoning

the debate is heated but not violent — every family's position is heard
